topic: My brother went missing for six hours when we were kids and came back wrong
title: My Brother Went Missing for Six Hours When We Were Kids and Came Back Wrong | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: My brother came back from the woods wrong. We were kids. Six hours missing.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of the edge of a residential backyard at dusk, the lawn meeting a dark tree line, a small figure of a child seen from behind emerging from between the trees walking toward the camera, no face visible, summer evening light fading to dark, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: He was eight. I was ten. Our mother searched for six hours.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a residential street at dusk, a woman visible from behind walking slowly along the sidewalk calling out, houses on both sides dark and quiet, a streetlamp just coming on at the far end, vertical 9:16 framing

close shot of a hand holding a photocopied missing person flyer on standard white paper, a school photo of a young boy at the top, text below listing a name and description, the paper slightly crumpled, evening light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: He came home at two in the morning. Through the back door.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a back door with a screen door standing open at night, the interior kitchen light on and spilling out through the screen, the backyard dark beyond the light, no figure visible in the doorway, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Dry clothes. Not hungry. Not scared.
scenes.image_prompt: interior wide shot of a kitchen at night, a young boy sitting at a kitchen table in clean dry clothes, seen from behind, the overhead light on, a glass of water untouched in front of him, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: He said he had been in the yard the whole time.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of the same suburban backyard at night, the swing set visible in the dark, one swing slowly moving as if just vacated, the kitchen light from the house casting a rectangle on the grass, no one outside, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: He stopped talking about the woods.
scenes.image_prompt: wide exterior shot of the edge of a residential property where the backyard fence meets a dark tree line, late afternoon light, the trees dense and the interior completely dark, the fence gate standing slightly ajar, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: He used to love the woods.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a framed school photograph of two boys standing together outdoors at the edge of a tree line, the photo slightly faded, both figures with their backs to the camera looking into the trees, afternoon light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: That fall he stopped sleeping. Drew the same shape on everything.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a child's school notebook lying open on a wooden desk, pages covered edge to edge with the same simple geometric shape drawn over and over in pencil, a lamp on the desk casting warm light, shadows filling the background, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I found those notebooks last spring. Thirty years later in my mother's attic. Every page the same shape. Three hundred pages.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a dimly lit attic, a person sitting on the floor with their back to camera surrounded by open spiral notebooks, the pages visible from above all covered in identical pencil drawings, a single bare bulb overhead, cardboard boxes in shadow behind, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Danny is fine now. Normal life. Two kids.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a framed family photograph on a shelf, two adults and two children standing outside a house, seen from slightly too far to make out faces clearly, afternoon light, dust on the frame, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I saw the shape on his daughter's homework last Christmas.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a child's drawing on white paper lying on a holiday-decorated kitchen table, a simple geometric shape drawn in crayon repeated across the page, Christmas lights visible in soft focus in the background, warm ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing
